title: GANTT - Label By Column Type (already exists in Calendar View)

Description

I have a board that has 6 timeline columns.  …

posts.author: andrewginn (Andrew Ginn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The calendar view has an option to label items by column type. It would be great to add this as an option for GANTT view as well.

What are you trying to achieve

I have a board that has 6 timeline columns. I’d like to have a gantt chart that uses the column headers of those columns to organize its data. In calendar view I can label by column name. It doesn’t seem like there’s a way to do that with GANTT view.
